effect: Frames per animation export; more frames = longer LLM context cost.
Per-agent rendering budget per turn; higher lets agents reason visually over many candidate moves.
Minimum gap between announcements on the §7.12 unified canvas-adjacent role='status' aria-live='polite' region. Prevents JAWS/NVDA from clipping mid-sentence reads (below 1000 ms creates friction).
Angular dead-band (deg) within which release snaps to nearest cardinal steward axis; 0 disables snap.
Ease-out-cubic fade-in duration for the arcball sphere on twist activation; < 100 feels poppy, > 400 feels reluctant.
Ease-in-cubic fade-out duration after gesture release; asymmetric with fadeIn so the eye verifies the release pose.
Ease-out-cubic duration for the camera to interpolate to the minimap's final pose after release.
Alpha of the Bone-tinted arcball shell; > 0.25 starts occluding the minimap inside.
Translucent arcball sphere radius as multiple of N (radius = factor * N); must exceed 1.0 to enclose the board.
World-units/s ceiling on layer-traversal dolly; higher feels jet-ski, lower feels surgical.
Exponential-smoothing time constant (s) for camera dolly; raise for inertia, lower for snap.
World-unit offset from camera position at which behind-cells begin to fade; 0 = hard clip, larger = wider soft-fade gradient.
Ease-out-cubic duration of the Re-Center glyph's return-to-seat tween; < 300 feels teleport, > 1200 feels syrup.
Width of the fade-out gradient at the layer-traversal near-clip boundary. 0 = hard clip; >0 = smooth dissolve.
Edge darkening when camera is inside the AABB. 0 = none, 0.5 = strong. The spec text reads 0..0.35 at peak.
Debounce on Shift+Arrow key-repeat to prevent stray text-navigation from triggering first-twist theater.
Discrete pitch delta per Shift+ArrowUp/Down press for keyboard arcball parity.
Discrete yaw delta per Shift+ArrowLeft/Right press for keyboard arcball parity.
World-unit shell radius of cells in the minimap-inside-sphere; cores and pipes scale proportionally.
ASCII BoardView pipe to §7.12 aria-live region. 'verbose' announces twist-neighbors on focus; DEFERRED to v0.5.
Minimap radius multiplier during active twist gesture.
Resting minimap arcball radius as multiple of N (desktop §4.10.3 is 1.6).
Minimum screen-space diameter of minimap regardless of world-unit projection.
Atari 0.6 Hz breath pulse amplitude under prefers-reduced-motion (vs default 0.9). Brand override: never zero (pedagogy load-bearing).
Hz of the active-steward seat radius envelope (+-3% modulation); > 1.0 reads as anxious.
World-unit radius of the steward-colored seat ball floating on the ring.
Seat elevation above board midplane as multiple of N (y = factor * N); 0 = eye-level, 0.6 = god-view.
Seat ring radius as multiple of N (R = factor * N); 1.20 sits inside the AABB shoulder, 3.00 reads as auditorium.
Pixel size of the steward name/tag rendered beside each seat ball.

defaultValue: Board minimap revealed. Twist or Shift+Arrow to rotate.
effect: Polite §7.12 aria-live announcement at theater end and on degraded 200 ms paths. Sourced from §7.6 AI-API ASCII channel registry.
Peak alpha of Clay #D97757 Fresnel rim during theater. Settles to §4.10.3 spec 0.35 by t=1200 ms.
Timestamp within the dolly at which Clay rim alpha peaks.
If true and AI Atari mist is active (mesh-size >= 6), theater defers to next idle gesture.
Cinematic orbit angle on desktop viewports above 768 px. 0 = no orbit.
Cinematic orbit angle on mobile-portrait at-or-below 768 px. Lower mitigates angular-FOV vestibular load.
Main-camera cinematic dolly duration. 0 disables dolly while preserving the fade.
Allow Shift+twist to re-fire theater without clearing storage. Drawer encore line always present.
First-twist Bone sphere fade-in duration. 200 = §4.10.3 spec snap, 800 = theater default.
URL hash that, on load, clears cirisgame.onboarding.firstTwistSeen_v04 for QA and content capture.
Versioned localStorage key. Bump suffix to force re-show on protocol changes.
ColorGrading.global.exposure for the AgX tonemapper. Negative = darker, positive = brighter; Anthropic-neutral starting point.
ColorGrading.global.post_saturation for AgX. >1 boosts color punch; <1 mutes.
Lower = more surfaces bloom; raise to keep clear glass dark.
Halo size around colored cores; > 0.7 reads as hot.
How much steward color drives bloom; tied to T(M) at runtime.
Hue shift toward cool (Lapis) for mourning meshes. Higher = more visibly grieving.
Duration of the screen-wide bloom pulse at the WILD ending. Longer = more euphoric.
Brightens the whole scene; > 1.3 starts clipping Clay highlights into white.
Lifts the shadow side; high values kill the form, low values turn spheres dramatic.
Borosilicate edge cast; > 0.07 starts to look like jade.
Hardens the shadow side of each sphere; lower = flatter, more ceramic.
Strengthens the silhouette; this is the glass-edge knob.
Adds ambient bath; > 0.6 washes out the rim.
Cloudflare Worker base URL for aggregates GET and submission POST. Configurable for self-hosting and CI.
Master switch. False removes 'Today' button and rejects #d= hash route (falls through to screensaver).
Cloudflare edge cache TTL for OG card PNG. 24h matches the daily rollover.
Which share string the Copy button writes. ascii_plus_grid is the dual-line default; grid_only never the silent default to keep accessibility canonical.
Show the non-ranking coherence ribbon (plays count + all-survivors count; median DEFERRED to v0.5). Hides silently if endpoint unavailable.
Display &p=N inviter target pill on landing. v0.4 LOCKED false per K-factor optimization deferral; v0.5 may enable.

EXPLICITLY LOCKED OFF. Streak counters convert M-1 sustained-coherence pedagogy into anxiety; hard-no per accessibility + brand consensus. Knob exists so future PRs proposing a streak find the locked refusal first.
Minimum pre-existing perma-dead cells on a daily board. K is drawn as k_min + (rng % k_range) — DESIGN_BRIEF §8.2.
RNG modulus for the daily perma-dead count K. Range 13 with k_min=3 gives K in [3,15] (2.4%-12% of a 5x5x5 board).
Default state of opt-in submission checkbox on end screen. Must stay false to honor accessibility + privacy bounds.
Worker KV rate limit on POST endpoint to deter casual abuse without a replay verifier.
Delay before screensaver auto-restarts after a normal end. 0 = instant restart; 10 s = lets the viewer absorb the score.
Delay before screensaver auto-restarts after a WILD ending. Longer than normal because the wild animation runs ~18 s itself.
Cursor + chrome auto-hide delay in screensaver.
Verdigris ring alpha around atari cells. Higher = more obvious 'this is dying soon'; lower = subtle hint to advanced players only.
Verdigris foreshadowing ring opacity around atari cells.
Lattice opacity; higher = grid more present.
Bevy RenderLayers index for minimap entities and the dedicated minimap camera; must not collide with 0 (main) or 1 (selective bloom cores).
Render minimap with unlit emissive material (true) or full PBR (false); false re-enters the refraction/shadow stack and costs frame budget.
Pipe presence; thicker reads as cables, thinner as filaments.
How far the green tint reaches into the shell.
RGB split at the rim; > 0.06 starts to look like a cheap lens.
Refraction band width; thicker = more lensing on the core.
Viewport width below which MobilePortrait Bevy Resource activates (combined with portrait orientation + coarse pointer).
Resting camera elevation above horizon in portrait mode (seat ring R = 1.80 * N unchanged).
Initial down-tilt that eases to default elevation over 1.2 s on first portrait load.
Initial HUD thumb-reach side. 'auto' uses first non-place tap location heuristic; DEFERRED to v0.5. Persists to localStorage.
Dwell time before single-finger drag arms as twist gesture. Tunable for motor-impaired range.
Movement budget during dwell before twist-arm cancels.
navigator.deviceMemory below which mobile-lite Cargo feature auto-engages.
Inhale/exhale frequency of the atari particle emissive pulse. ~0.6 Hz reads as held human breath (10/min); too slow feels dead; too fast feels panicked.
Phase-coupling strength across the atari mesh's particles. 0 = independent (no synchrony, atari illegible). >0.6 = lockstep so tight it looks scripted.
Locked particle orbit speed when a mesh enters atari. Slower than calm temperature default so the breath reads as 'holding'.
Sparkle burst frequency per celebrating mesh. Higher = more confetti.
Orbit-speed multiplier for surviving meshes far from any perma-dead. Higher = giddier.
Orbit-speed multiplier for surviving meshes face-adjacent to any perma-dead cell. 0 = halt; 0.3 = contemplative; 1.0 = no mourning.
Slow camera rotation around the board during WILD. 540 deg = one and a half full rotations; visible but not nauseating.
In the WILD all-survived ending, agent particles cross mesh-color boundaries on Hermite arcs. Disabling reduces to celebrate-only (less rapturous).
Pattern evolution speed; halving doubles the effective shimmer period.
Simplex noise sample velocity inside the perma-dead mist. Slower than temp by half — the cell has settled. 0 = still mist.
Simplex noise sample velocity inside perma-dead (green) mist.
Volumetric integration steps per fragment. Lower = chunkier mist + cheaper. Higher = smoother + more expensive.
Simplex noise sample velocity inside the temp-dead mist. Faster = more agitated death scene.
Simplex noise sample velocity inside temp-dead (black) mist.
Particle base spin; zero stills the at-rest sphere.
Heat-driven wobble amplitude; > 0.30 reads as escaping the shell.
Display normalization scale; smaller = saturates faster into chaos band.
Internal Brownian gain; bigger alpha = lone-large meshes run hotter.
Large-bleeds-to-small rate; higher = stronger heat-capacity asymmetry.
Resonance gain; higher = twin-large meshes peak harder together. Set by the BACKLOG #3 sweep (nudged +0.002 from 0.060 so the near-atari pair (6,5) clears the trigger).

Scale floor for the §4.3 resonance trigger: both meshes of a face-pair must be at least this size before they can resonate. Small groups near each other only vibe; big groups near each other excite (BACKLOG #3 Gap 1). Without it the trigger is scale-free for balanced pairs.
Heated-by-larger gain; higher = small meshes panic faster near big ones.
New-cell scale-in duration; lower = snappy, higher = ceremonial.
Inter-move pacing in screensaver; lower = arcade, higher = aquarium.
Show 4 s tooltip 'this name stays on your device' on first-ever commit. Once dismissed never shown again per browser/profile.
Show one-time banner when localStorage returns empty after a known prior session (Safari ITP or Firefox ETP wipe detection).
Politeness level for §7.12 aria-live mirror of legend thinking state. assertive interrupts, polite queues.
Hard cap on extended grapheme clusters per steward name input. Lower for tighter legend/seat-tag fit; higher for full real-world names.
Renders pigment name as 12 px Stone secondary line beneath custom name in §5.5 legend and §5.7 score row. Color-blind and AT anchor.
Whether the inline end-screen card auto-loops. Disabling forces explicit play tap; play-sim confirms autoLoop is load-bearing for the share-loop firing before swipe-away reflex.
Hard size ceiling in KB for the APNG. Frame-drop fallback triggers above this, max 3 passes. Higher values let you keep all frames at 384x384.
Number of turns captured, centered on highest-|M| event (or final 12 for WILD). Smaller windows tighten the dispersal cascade; larger windows include more setup but blow byte budget.
Whether the static -card.png bakes a Tiempos epigram strip ('{score} perma-dead.' / 'The federation held.'). Off ships card.png as a clean board-state frame.
WCAG 2.3.1 luminance-delta threshold for the pre-encode flash guard. Lower = more aggressive 167 ms hold-frame injection during the dispersal cascade.
Animation frame rate. 6 fps matches §7.6 and the size budget. Raising trades file size for smoother dispersal-cascade motion.

Pixel dimensions of the shareable APNG and card.png. 384 is the human-readable default; 256 matches the AI-API §7.6 size for parity. Larger values may trip the 500 KB cap and force frame-drop fallback.
Maximum silent gap between ambient variant plays (v0.5 ambient asset).
Minimum silent gap between ambient variant plays (v0.5 ambient asset).
Ambient bus gain on first enable (off by default; ambient assets deferred to v0.5).
Render the §7.12 aria-live captions visibly under the legend for deaf-sighted players (v0.5 UI; v0.4 knob locked at default).
Foley duck after 4 clicks in a 2 s window; 800 ms release.
Uniform plus-or-minus pitch jitter per placement tick; fights repetition fatigue.
Foley bus gain on first enable.
Asset-vendor loudnorm integrated LUFS target.
Master bus gain on first enable.
When true, master ducks -18 dB during local 22:00-07:00 (v0.5 UI; v0.4 knob locked at default).
Sting bus gain on first enable (loud-by-default per Naomi compromise).
Asset-vendor loudnorm true-peak ceiling.
Clay #D97757 dot opacity pulse in the §5.6.2 'tap to enable' banner.
WILD chord duration.
